title: Exomis microphylla

It is classified as a flowering plant, with small, greenish-white flowers. Exomis microphylla is a shrub-like plant that grows up to a certain height, typically in dry areas. The plant's classification is further detailed in its botanical name, with Exomis microphylla being the accepted name.

intro: Exomis microphylla, also known as the small-leaved Exomis, is a plant species in the family Mimosaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its reported health benefits.
